title: HerbJerkKetoGooeyStuffedVegetables
description: A savory Chinese Shandong-inspired solo-dinner dish featuring gooey vegetables stuffed with a Korean-style jerk seasoning and fried to perfection, suitable for the Keto diet.

ingredients.name: bell peppers
ingredients.amount: 1 large each for yellow and red

instructions: Clean and slice zucchini into rounds, halve the bell peppers lengthwise.
Sauté minced jalapeno, garlic, and ground pork in hot vegetable oil until cooked through. Stir in oyster sauce, soy sauce, brown sugar, salt, and pepper for about 5 minutes on low heat.
Add seasoned ground meat mixture to zucchini slices and bell peppers, gently mix to coat evenly. Stuff each vegetable half with the meat mixture.
Preheat oven at 400°F (205°C). Place stuffed vegetables in a greased baking dish and bake for about 30 minutes until golden brown and tender.
Serve hot as a keto-friendly solo dinner.
